judge_reason: Description A quotes pre-printed footer text ('For Reservations Call 1-800-HOTELS 1') that Description B does not mention at all, indicating a factual inconsistency on visual content.
original_image_tags: A handwritten note on a piece of stationery with a pre-printed logo and footer. The logo at the top is a brown circular emblem containing a stylized letter "R" with two smaller interlocking rings or loops below it. The text is handwritten in black ink. At the bottom of the page, pre-printed text reads: "For Reservations Call 1-800-HOTELS 1".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned handwritten note on lined paper with a small circular logo at the top; the note is headed “TUES-” and contains several lines of cursive text. A printed line at the bottom reads “For Reservations Call 1-800-HOTELS 1.”*
